## Hasil Tabel Pengelompokkan Grup Berdasarkan Pola Keterbelitan 

:::{.r-stack}
:::{.fragment .fade-out}
<table style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 0.65em; font-family: sans-serif;">
  <thead>
    <!-- Baris Kondisi Utama -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #555;">
      <th style="padding: 8px; font-weight: bold;">Grup</th>
      <th colspan="4" style="padding: 8px; font-weight: bold; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">Before</th>
      <th colspan="4" style="padding: 8px; font-weight: bold; background-color: #f0f4f8;">After</th>
    </tr>
    <!-- Baris Pasangan Sudut Parameter -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #333; font-size: 0.9em;">
      <th></th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/12, π/12</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/12, π/2</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/2, π/12</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">π/2, π/2</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/12, π/12</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/12, π/2</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/2, π/12</th>
      <th style="padding: 6px;">π/2, π/2</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>

  <tbody style="font-weight: bold;">
    <!-- Grup 1 -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 1</td>
      <td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 2 -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 2</td>
      <td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 3 -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 3</td>
      <td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td>
      <td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 4 -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 4</td>
      <td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 5 -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 5</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
    <!-- Grup 6 -->
    <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #333;">
      <td style="padding: 8px; background-color: #fdfdfd; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;">Grup 6</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555; border-right: 2px solid #bbb;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
      <td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
<div style="text-align:center; margin-top:20px; font-size:0.55em;">
  <span style="display:inline-block; margin:0 10px;">
    <span style="display:inline-block;width:15px;height:15px;background:#225ea8;border:1px solid #333;vertical-align:middle;"></span>
    ABC (Tripartite)
  </span>

  <span style="display:inline-block; margin:0 10px;">
    <span style="display:inline-block;width:15px;height:15px;background:#41b6c4;border:1px solid #333;vertical-align:middle;"></span>
    C-AB (Bipartite)
  </span>

  <span style="display:inline-block; margin:0 10px;">
    <span style="display:inline-block;width:15px;height:15px;background:#a1dab4;border:1px solid #333;vertical-align:middle;"></span>
    A-BC (Bipartite)
  </span>

  <span style="display:inline-block; margin:0 10px;">
    <span style="display:inline-block;width:15px;height:15px;background:#e0e0e0;border:1px solid #333;vertical-align:middle;"></span>
    A-B-C (Separabel)
  </span>
</div>

:::

:::{.fragment .fade-in-then-out}
<table style="border-collapse:collapse;width:100%;text-align:left;">
<thead>
<tr>
<th style="width:15%;">Grup</th>
<th>Pasangan Parameter $(\alpha_i,\alpha_j)$</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Grup 1</td>
<td>$(\alpha_2,\alpha_6)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_8)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_{12})$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_6)$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_6)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_{10})$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_6)$</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Grup 2</td>
<td>$(\alpha_2,\alpha_4)$, $(\alpha_2,\alpha_{10})$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_{10})$, $(\alpha_4,\alpha_8)$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_{12})$</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Grup 3</td>
<td>$(\alpha_4,\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_8)$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_4)$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_{10})$</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Grup 4</td>
<td>$(\alpha_4,\alpha_6)$, $(\alpha_6,\alpha_4)$</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Grup 5</td>
<td>$(\alpha_2,\alpha_8)$, $(\alpha_2,\alpha_{12})$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_8,\alpha_{12})$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_2)$, $(\alpha_{12},\alpha_8)$</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Grup 6</td>
<td>$(\alpha_4,\alpha_{10})$, $(\alpha_{10},\alpha_4)$</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
:::

:::{.fragment}
::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
<!-- ***Temuan Umum*** -->

<!-- - $(\pi/12,\pi/12)$ paling stabil menghasilkan **tripartit (ABC)**
- $\pi/2$ menyebabkan penurunan keterbelitan:
  tripartit → bipartit → separabel
- Keterbelitan dipengaruhi:
  - besar sudut rotasi
  - kombinasi parameter operator lokal -->


***Grup 1***

- ABC hanya pada $(\pi/12,\pi/12)$
<!-- - Selain itu separabel -->
- Sangat sensitif terhadap sudut


***Grup 2***

- ABC pada $(\pi/12,\pi/12)$ dan $(\pi/2,\pi/12)$
- Dipengaruhi parameter kedua


***Grup 3***

- Kebalikan Grup 2
- ABC muncul saat parameter pertama = $\pi/12$
- Efek urutan parameter jelas terlihat

<!-- ***Catatan Teoretis***

- Tidak ada hubungan langsung yang pasti dengan generator Gell-Mann
- Karena operator merupakan kombinasi beberapa generator
- Perlu analisis Lie algebra lebih dalam -->

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

***Grup 4***

- Tripartit → bipartit → separabel
- Degradasi bertahap


***Grup 5***

- Tidak pernah tripartit
- Hanya bipartit atau separabel

***Grup 6***

- Selalu separabel
- Tidak ada keterbelitan terbentuk

:::

:::

:::

:::
